name: Young and Restless Carrot Cake (Lauralee Bell
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and salt.
3. Add the eggs, oil, baking soda, sugar, and cinnamon to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
4. Fold in the grated carrots.
5. Pour the batter into three greased 9-inch cake pans.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cakes to cool completely before frosting.
8. For the icing, mix together cream cheese, melted butter, vanilla extract, and powdered sugar until smooth.
9. Spread the icing over the cooled cake layers.
10. Garnish with chopped pecans or carrot curls if desired.
Note: The original recipe included an attribution line that has been removed as per instructions.
